title: St. Mary's Church, Vechoor
tagline: St. Mary's Church, Vechoor — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Church, Vechoor is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Church is a church in Vechoor, that was consecrated in 1463. It stands on the Eastern bank of Vembanad Lake. It belongs to the Syro-Malabar Catholic Major Archeparchy of Ernakulam-Angamaly.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vechoor
topPlaces.description: Vechoor is a village in Vaikom taluk, Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. Vechoor is a short drive away from one of Kerala's tourist destinations, Kumarakom.

topPlaces.name: Thanneermukkom Bund
topPlaces.description: The Thanneermukkom Bund (Thannermukkom Salt Water Barrier) was constructed as a part of the Kuttanad Development Scheme to prevent tidal action and intrusion of salt water into the Kuttanad low-lands across Vembanad Lake between Thannermukkom on west and Vechur on east. Thanneermukkom Bund was constructed in 1974 and is functional since 1976.

topPlaces.name: Peruviruthy
topPlaces.description: Poruvazhy Peruviruthy Malanada Temple is a temple dedicated to Duryodhana, is located in Poruvazhy Village of Kunnathur Tehsil in the Kollam district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thalayazham
topPlaces.description: Thalayazham is a small village located in Vaikom Taluk, Kottayam district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pathiramanal
topPlaces.description: Pathiramanal is a small island in Muhamma panchayat of Alappuzha district located in Vembanad Lake. The name Pathiramanal means 'midnight sand'.

topPlaces.name: Chemmanathukara
topPlaces.description: Chemmanathukara is a place in Vaikom Village, Kottayam District, Kerala, India. It is part of T.V. Puram Panchayat (Thirumani Venkitapuram Panchayat).

topPlaces.name: Kokkamangalam
topPlaces.description: Kokkamangalam also known as Gokkamangalam is a village in Alappuzha district of Kerala state, south India. It is situated in between Cochin and Kumarakom and on the western shore of Vembanad Lake, 5 km east of the town of Cherthala, which has the nearest railway station.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas Church, Kokkamangalam
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Kokkamangalam, popularly known as Kokkamangalam Church, which holds a midway position among the seven churches founded by St.

items.note: Vechoor is a village in Vaikom taluk, Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. Vechoor is a short drive away from one of Kerala's tourist destinations, Kumarakom.

The Thanneermukkom Bund (Thannermukkom Salt Water Barrier) was constructed as a part of the Kuttanad Development Scheme to prevent tidal action and intrusion of salt water into the Kuttanad low-lands across Vembanad Lake between Thannermukkom on west and Vechur on east. Thanneermukkom Bund was constructed in 1974 and is functional since 1976.
Poruvazhy Peruviruthy Malanada Temple is a temple dedicated to Duryodhana, is located in Poruvazhy Village of Kunnathur Tehsil in the Kollam district of Kerala, India.
Thalayazham is a small village located in Vaikom Taluk, Kottayam district, Kerala, India.
Pathiramanal is a small island in Muhamma panchayat of Alappuzha district located in Vembanad Lake. The name Pathiramanal means 'midnight sand'.
Chemmanathukara is a place in Vaikom Village, Kottayam District, Kerala, India. It is part of T.V. Puram Panchayat (Thirumani Venkitapuram Panchayat).

Kokkamangalam also known as Gokkamangalam is a village in Alappuzha district of Kerala state, south India. It is situated in between Cochin and Kumarakom and on the western shore of Vembanad Lake, 5 km east of the town of Cherthala, which has the nearest railway station.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Church, Vechoor?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Church, Vechoor is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Church, Vechoor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Church, Vechoor?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Church, Vechoor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Church, Vechoor?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Church, Vechoor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Church, Vechoor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vechoor, Thanneermukkom Bund, Peruviruthy, Thalayazham, Pathiramanal.
